title: Machine Feeders and Offbearers
description: Feed materials into or remove materials from machines or equipment that is automatic or tended by other workers.

tasks.text: Inspect materials and products for defects, and to ensure conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Record production and operational data, such as amount of materials processed.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Push dual control buttons and move controls to start, stop, or adjust machinery and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh or measure materials or products to ensure conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify and mark materials, products, and samples, following instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and maintain machinery, equipment, and work areas to ensure proper functioning and safe working conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load materials and products into machines and equipment, or onto conveyors, using hand tools and moving devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transfer materials and products to and from machinery and equipment, using industrial trucks or hand trucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fasten, package, or stack materials and products, using hand tools and fastening equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove materials and products from machines and equipment, and place them in boxes, trucks or conveyors, using hand tools and moving devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shovel or scoop materials into containers, machines, or equipment for processing, storage, or transport.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Open and close gates of belt and pneumatic conveyors on machines that are fed directly from preceding machines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Add chemicals, solutions, or ingredients to machines or equipment as required by the manufacturing process.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
